title: Gale Daggers
description: Gale Daggers adds six fast dash daggers to Fabric 1.21.11, each with unique speed, cooldown, particles, combat effects, and a craftable Legendary amethyst tier.
body:
Gale Daggers adds fast wind-powered daggers to Minecraft with smooth multi-tick dashes, cooldown-based movement, and a special wind slash attack.

Each dagger tier has its own strength, dash duration, and cooldown:

Wood

Stone

Iron

Gold

Diamond

Legendary

How to use
Right-click to dash forward

the dash follows your camera direction

each dagger tier has different speed, duration, and cooldown

Crouch + right-click to use a wind slash

Diamond and Legendary daggers are fireproof

Crafting
All main Gale Daggers use this vertical recipe:

Feather

Material

Stick

Materials:

Wood → Oak Planks

Stone → Cobblestone

Iron → Iron Ingot

Gold → Gold Ingot

Diamond → Diamond

Legendary → Amethyst
[The Gale Daggers Recipe (Only change the the material)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0c9bc2e8a047f79b491481736f08603cbbd1e71d.png)

Features
smooth multi-tick dash movement

tier-based power and cooldowns

actionbar cooldown feedback

particles and sounds during dash

combat-style movement effects

crouch + right-click wind slash

responsive mobility-focused gameplay

The mod is designed to make movement feel:

fast

responsive

flashy

ability-based

Perfect for players who want a mobility weapon that feels more like a modded skill than a normal item.

Discord:.kjs0
